message:
refactor(nav): move React Widget from navbar to hero CTA button

The React Widget page doesn't need its own nav entry — it's a secondary
demo page. Moved it to a CTA button in the hero section next to
"TRY LIVE DEMO", with a green-accent border style to tie it visually
to the live demo button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ import { Zap, Cpu, Shield, + Blocks, } from "lucide-react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; @@ -102,6 +103,16 @@ export default function HomePage() { TRY LIVE DEMO + + + + REACT WIDGET + +
